name: Glade Cubist Face Features v9
description: Eyes/nose/mouth/ear/hair with constrained bands and high diversity
code: var ctx=drawingContext,f=state.cubistFrame,p=state.cubist||{}; if(!f) return; var w=f.w,h=f.h,cx=f.x+w*(p.cx||0.5),cy=f.y+h*(p.cy||0.54),sc=(p.scale||1),fw=w*0.56*sc,fh=h*0.74*sc,split=(p.split||0)*fw; function hs(hh,s,l,a){return 'hsla('+(((hh%360)+360)%360)+','+s+'%,'+l+'%,'+a+')';} var pal=f.pal; var exL=-fw*(p.eyeGap||0.2), exR=Math.max(-fw*0.02, fw*((p.eyeGap||0.2)*0.45) + split*0.10), eyeY=-fh*(p.eyeBandY||0.32), noseY=-fh*(p.noseBandY||0.48), mouthY=-fh*(p.mouthBandY||0.70); ctx.save(); ctx.translate(cx,cy); ctx.rotate((p.tilt||0)*0.11); function eye(x,y,t,flip){ctx.beginPath(); if(t===0){ctx.ellipse(x,y,w*0.042,w*0.024,0,0,Math.PI*2);} else if(t===1){ctx.moveTo(x-w*0.036,y);ctx.lineTo(x+w*0.032,y-w*0.014);ctx.lineTo(x+w*0.036,y+w*0.014);ctx.closePath();} else if(t===2){ctx.rect(x-w*0.032,y-w*0.016,w*0.064,w*0.032);} else if(t===3){ctx.arc(x,y,w*0.030,0,Math.PI*2);} else if(t===4){ctx.moveTo(x-w*0.036,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y-w*0.024,x+w*0.036,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+w*0.024,x-w*0.036,y);} else {ctx.moveTo(x-w*0.032,y-w*0.016);ctx.lineTo(x+w*0.038,y);ctx.lineTo(x-w*0.032,y+w*0.016);ctx.closePath();} ctx.fillStyle='rgba(245,242,234,0.96)'; ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(24,20,22,0.72)'; ctx.lineWidth=Math.max(1,w*0.0035); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x+(flip?-w*0.003:w*0.003),y,w*0.009,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(12,12,16,0.98)'; ctx.fill(); } eye(exL,eyeY,p.eyeLType||0,false); eye(exR,eyeY+fh*(0.03+p.eyeAsym*0.2),p.eyeRType||1,true); ctx.beginPath(); if((p.noseType||0)===0){ctx.moveTo(-fw*0.02,noseY-fh*0.08);ctx.lineTo(fw*0.10,noseY+fh*0.06);ctx.lineTo(-fw*0.01,noseY+fh*0.18);ctx.closePath();} else if((p.noseType||0)===1){ctx.moveTo(-fw*0.01,noseY-fh*0.10);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(fw*0.15,noseY+fh*0.01,fw*0.02,noseY+fh*0.18);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-fw*0.07,noseY+fh*0.05,-fw*0.01,noseY-fh*0.10);} else if((p.noseType||0)===2){ctx.rect(-fw*0.03,noseY-fh*0.07,fw*0.10,fh*0.20);} else if((p.noseType||0)===3){ctx.moveTo(-fw*0.03,noseY-fh*0.08);ctx.bezierCurveTo(fw*0.06,noseY-fh*0.01,fw*0.08,noseY+fh*0.10,-fw*0.01,noseY+fh*0.16);ctx.bezierCurveTo(-fw*0.08,noseY+fh*0.10,-fw*0.08,noseY+fh*0.00,-fw*0.03,noseY-fh*0.08);} else {ctx.ellipse(fw*0.02,noseY+fh*0.04,w*0.032,h*0.046,0,0,Math.PI*2);} ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[3],54,42,0.96); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(24,20,22,0.7)'; ctx.stroke(); var mw=fw*(p.mouthW||0.30); ctx.beginPath(); if((p.mouthType||0)===0){ctx.moveTo(-mw,mouthY);ctx.bezierCurveTo(-mw*0.45,mouthY+fh*0.07,mw*0.45,mouthY+fh*0.07,mw,mouthY);ctx.bezierCurveTo(mw*0.30,mouthY+fh*0.04,-mw*0.30,mouthY+fh*0.04,-mw,mouthY);} else if((p.mouthType||0)===1){ctx.moveTo(-mw*0.95,mouthY+fh*0.02);ctx.bezierCurveTo(-mw*0.30,mouthY-fh*0.07,mw*0.30,mouthY-fh*0.05,mw,mouthY+fh*0.02);} else if((p.mouthType||0)===2){ctx.moveTo(-mw*0.9,mouthY);ctx.lineTo(mw*0.35,mouthY+fh*0.06);ctx.lineTo(mw,mouthY-fh*0.01);} else if((p.mouthType||0)===3){ctx.moveTo(-mw,mouthY);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(0,mouthY+fh*0.10,mw,mouthY+fh*0.01);} else {ctx.moveTo(-mw*0.85,mouthY+fh*0.01);ctx.bezierCurveTo(-mw*0.20,mouthY+fh*0.11,mw*0.30,mouthY+fh*0.09,mw*0.92,mouthY+fh*0.01);ctx.bezierCurveTo(mw*0.24,mouthY+fh*0.06,-mw*0.22,mouthY+fh*0.06,-mw*0.85,mouthY+fh*0.01);} ctx.fillStyle='rgba(138,30,42,0.94)'; ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(70,14,20,0.92)'; ctx.lineWidth=Math.max(2,w*0.006); ctx.stroke(); if((p.earType||0)===0){ctx.beginPath();ctx.ellipse(-fw*0.42,-fh*0.02,w*0.028,h*0.05,0,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[0],38,54,0.86);ctx.fill();} if((p.hairType||0)===0){ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[2]-20,28,16,0.72);ctx.fillRect(-fw*0.36,-fh*0.52,fw*0.66,fh*0.14);} else if((p.hairType||0)===1){ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[2]-10,26,18,0.72);ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(-fw*0.38,-fh*0.46);ctx.lineTo(fw*0.24,-fh*0.48);ctx.lineTo(fw*0.06,-fh*0.30);ctx.lineTo(-fw*0.32,-fh*0.30);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();} ctx.restore();
